data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Unified reporting across free and paid conversions', but the evidence does not include any checks or validations that confirm this requirement is met. While there are multiple prior steps that indicate successful bookings and financial outputs, there is no explicit evidence demonstrating that reporting is unified across different pricing models. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence validating 'Unified reporting across free and paid conversions'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
